---
title: '2014/06/16 Journal Monday -'
date: '2014-06-16T11:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8204402834076105723'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140616-journal-monday.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

SO... Flavia was right, I ate too much my first day after the fast.<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/06/healthy-beginnings-story-about-health.html" target="_blank">Why I did it.</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/06/lesson-from-camp-detox-week.html" target="_blank">The Results.&nbsp;</a><br />
<br />
It's now day two of eating. I have choices to make. I packed a salad and healthy pasta (brown rice noodles).<br />
<br />
I need to make sure to actually take my lunch today, especially since I can work ot now. I should be able to catch up this week? I had to take on some of Amanda's cases in her sudden departure.<br />
<br />
I'm enjoying this work. I feel very independent, and yet part of a team.<br />
<br />
dw<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
